ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Nation, State, City) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the dataset (e.g., United States) */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Time period during which the data was collected */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., Number, Percent) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset (e.g., population, economic indicators) */,
  "data_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the dataset (e.g., population by age group) */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., time series, cross-sectional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_format FOREIGN KEY ("data_format") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_time_frame FOREIGN KEY ("time_frame") REFERENCES timeframes ("timeframe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_location_type FOREIGN KEY ("location_type") REFERENCES locations ("location_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Nation, State, City) */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Standardized location code (e.g., ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) */,
  "location_level" TEXT /* Level of geographic aggregation (e.g., national, subnational, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeframes" (
  "timeframe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeframe */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the timeframe */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the timeframe */,
  "timeframe_type" TEXT /* Type of timeframe (e.g., annual, quarterly, monthly) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeframe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., Number, Percent) */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata refers to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection */,
  "collection_method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data collection method */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Description of the data coverage */,
  "data_limitations" TEXT /* Description of any limitations or caveats associated with the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web interface, API, data download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., annual reports, thematic reports) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score assigned to the dataset */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality assessment was performed */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "quality_check_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality checking */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the alert refers to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_category" TEXT /* Category of the alert (e.g., data updates, system notifications) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
